metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the General Listings Marketplace domain, covering buyer discovery, seller tooling, monetization, and trust.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productExperience: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience now carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

experiences.name: Browse Interesting Listings
experiences.description: Help buyers enter the marketplace and quickly find listings worth exploring.

flows.title: Browse Interesting Listings
flows.description: Help buyers enter the marketplace and quickly find listings worth exploring.

steps.title: Open marketplace home
keyFacts: Open marketplace home is a meaningful step in the buyer journey flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when open marketplace home feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

dependencies.name: Homepage
dependencies.description: Introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and (personalized) links to other critical elements of the site (detail pages, search...)
dependencies.how: Uses Homepage for introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and in open marketplace home.

dependencies.name: Classifieds Recommendations
dependencies.description: Ability to match published classifieds with seekers' saved search criteria and provide recommendations (match classified & seeker)
dependencies.how: Uses Classifieds Recommendations for match published classifieds with seekers' saved search criteria and provide recommendations in open marketplace home.

steps.title: Browse category feed
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

experiences.name: Search, Save, and Return
experiences.description: Help buyers narrow choices, save intent, and come back to relevant inventory later.
outcomes: Faster path back to relevant listings

flows.title: Search, Save, and Return
flows.description: Help buyers narrow choices, save intent, and come back to relevant inventory later.

steps.title: Run search
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

dependencies.name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
dependencies.description: Ability to search for classifieds through diverse criteria (by location, price range, amenities, on map...)
dependencies.how: Uses Search Engine Results Page (SERP) for search for classifieds through diverse criteria in run search.

dependencies.name: Saved Search / Alerts
dependencies.description: Alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push
dependencies.how: Uses Saved Search / Alerts for alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push in run search.

dependencies.name: Search and Messaging Infrastructure
dependencies.description: Support indexing and alert delivery.
dependencies.how: Relies on Search and Messaging Infrastructure for indexing and alert delivery in run search.

steps.title: Apply filters

painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.

dependencies.description: Ability to send notifications with user preferences (via Email, Push, ...)
dependencies.how: Uses Notification Service for send notifications with user preferences in apply filters.

steps.title: Save search intent
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.

dependencies.description: Support indexing and alert delivery.

steps.title: Return through alert or notification
keyFacts: This step supports continuity between sessions and channels.
It helps users recover intent without restarting the whole journey.
painPoints: Users disengage when saved intent is hard to recover or alerts are noisy.
Return journeys break when notifications arrive too late or without context.

steps.title: Start seller conversation

experiences.name: Price with Confidence

flows.title: Price with Confidence
flows.description: Help a seller understand market signals and choose a more effective listing price.

steps.title: Review price suggestions
keyFacts: This step supports user visibility, decision quality, and operational control.
Users need concise signals, not raw system output.
painPoints: Users struggle when the state is hard to interpret or act on.
Decision quality drops when key signals are delayed or buried.

dependencies.name: Pricing Guidance Page
